description: It's all about dressing sporty, and what better way to do it with ease than with this bag from adidas.Height: 41.5cmWidth: 13cmDepth: 30cmMade of 100% polyester with a nylon lining One main zippered compartment with a laptop sleeveOne zippered compartment on the front with organiser pouchesMesh pockets on the sides for carrying a sipperPadded and adjustable shoulder straps with adidas logoSynthetic haul loop for handling easeBranded zippers and slidersCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
